reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Cola interminable,terminé yendo sin cargar hasta Junín de los Andes a 60 y disfrutando el paisaje llegas si cargaste en Cutral Có

(Translated by Google)
Endless queue, I ended up going without refueling all the way to Junín de los Andes at 60 km/h and enjoying the scenery; you can get there if you refueled in Cutral Có.
